channel.title: How to remove last slash from URL
channel.description:
Hello,
How to remove last slash from URL, See below example URLs
1. https://wd809.sse.codesandbox.io/category/nature/ to https://wd809.sse.codesandbox.io/category/nature
2. https://wd809.sse.codesandbox.io/category/travel/ to https://wd809.sse.codesandbox.io/category/travel
Please explain me how to fix or how to remove last slash from URL Let me know step by step file name.
Thanks, Pramod

item.title: How to remove last slash from URL
item.dc:creator: pramod.r
item.description:
Hello,

How to remove last slash from URL, See below example URLs

  1. https://wd809.sse.codesandbox.io/category/nature/ to Category: Nature - Test Frontity Blog

  2. https://wd809.sse.codesandbox.io/category/travel/ to
    Category: Travel - Test Frontity Blog

Please explain me how to fix or how to remove last slash from URL
Let me know step by step file name.

Thanks,
Pramod

Read full topic
item.source: How to remove last slash from URL
